content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_OrderStatusSummary
-- drop view v_OrderStatusSummary
AS
SELECT          A.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               ISNULL(B.[Status 33/0], 0) AS [Status 33/0]
,               ISNULL(C.[Status 33/7], 0) AS [Status 33/7]
,               ISNULL(D.[Status 33/8], 0) AS [Status 33/8]
,               ISNULL(E.[Status 44], 0) AS [Status 44]
,               ISNULL(F.[Status 66], 0) AS [Status 66]
,               ISNULL(G.[Status 77], 0) AS [Status 77]
,               ISNULL(G.[Status 77 Revenue], 0) AS [Status 77 Revenue]
FROM            
(
SELECT DISTINCT WHLO
FROM            M3.MITWHL
) A 

LEFT JOIN
                            
(
SELECT          OH.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 33/0'
FROM            M3.OOHEAD OH 
LEFT JOIN       M3.ODHEAD OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
WHERE           (
                cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) >= '2023-02-09' 
                OR
                OD.IVDT IS NULL
                )
AND (OH.ORST = '33') 
AND (OH.OBLC = '0')
GROUP BY OH.WHLO
) B ON A.WHLO = B.Warehouse 



LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 33/7'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date) >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '33') AND (OH.OBLC = '7')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS C ON A.WHLO = C.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 33/8'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '33') AND (OH.OBLC = '8')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS D ON A.WHLO = D.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 44'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '44')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS E ON A.WHLO = E.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 66'
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '66')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS F ON A.WHLO = F.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        OH.WHLO AS Warehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORNO) AS 'Status 77', SUM(OH.BRLA) AS [Status 77 Revenue]
                               FROM            M3.OOHEAD AS OH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                         M3.ODHEAD AS OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
                               WHERE        (cast(cast(nullif(OD.IVDT,0) as varchar(10)) as date)  >= '2023-02-09' OR
                                                         OD.IVDT IS NULL) AND (OH.ORST = '77')
                               GROUP BY OH.WHLO) AS G ON A.WHLO = G.Warehouse
WHERE        (ISNULL(B.[Status 33/0], 0) + ISNULL(C.[Status 33/7], 0) + ISNULL(D.[Status 33/8], 0) + ISNULL(E.[Status 44], 0) + ISNULL(F.[Status 66], 0) + ISNULL(G.[Status 77], 0) > 0)
